influenza_surveillance.short_description: Weekly influenza surveillance data from Missouri Department of Health & Senior Services
influenza_surveillance.long_description: Missouri Department of Health & Senior Services collects and reports influenza surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

ili_surveillance.short_description: Weekly ili surveillance data from Missouri Department of Health & Senior Services
ili_surveillance.long_description: Missouri Department of Health & Senior Services collects and reports ili surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

mo_dph.name: Missouri Department of Health & Senior Services
mo_dph.organization: Missouri Department of Health & Senior Services
mo_dph.description: Missouri Department of Health & Senior Services provides weekly respiratory surveillance data for Missouri covering pathogens including: influenza, ili . Data is published via state health department dashboards and reports. Temporal coverage: ~2019-ongoing. Geographic coverage: state level.
mo_dph.restrictions: Public domain state government health data.
